title: More Happier Ghasts
description: Adds more variations of the happy ghast's face by renaming it!
body:
**This texture pack allows you to change the face of a happy ghаst by giving it a specific name using a name tag.**

---
**Works with Optifine (forge) or ETF (fabric).**

---

![Specific names for happy ghast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c723ff0ec1c04303c411237ab4c7ebcad3db894.png)

Specific names:
1. UwU
2. The shy one
3. (>u<) 
4. <3
5. Cute
6. Sleepy
7. Cute tongue
8. Lick
9. Cute tongue2
10. Happy Nerd
11. So happy
12. Puss and boots's eyes
13. Neco
14. Neco2
15. Angry Nerd
16. OvO
17. What...
18. WTH???
19. Rock
20. Roblox face
